W.instructions: Female office worker in a business conversation. Professional, calm, friendly, and easy to understand.

M.instructions: Male office worker in a business conversation. Clear, neutral, professional, and slightly brisk.

lines.speaker: W
lines.text: Hi, Daniel. Did the printer paper arrive this morning?

lines.speaker: M
lines.text: Not yet. The supplier called and said the truck was delayed by heavy traffic.

lines.speaker: W
lines.text: Oh, that's a problem. We need it before this afternoon's training session.

lines.speaker: M
lines.text: I know. They expect the delivery around one thirty, so we should still have enough time.

lines.speaker: W
lines.text: Good. Then I'll postpone copying the handouts until after lunch.

lines.speaker: M
lines.text: All right. I'll let you know as soon as the boxes get here.
